Rapid industrialization often exacerbates existing inequalities between urban and rural populations.\n\nUrban migration accelerates these transformations. People who migrate to cities seek better economic opportunities.\n\nThe consequences they face are mixed. Some find prosperity while others struggle to adapt to new environments.",
